final_prompt.prompt:
Create a documentary-style editorial photograph for a 微博 news/trending post banner.

Style/medium: needs a photojournalistic, high-end mobile-shot documentary aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 wide horizontal layout with generous negative space for text overlay; skyline as primary horizontal subject
Subject: must include a city dusk skyline with neon lights beginning to glow, hurrying pedestrians in the foreground, and distant skyscrapers reflecting the last sunlight
Scene/backdrop: must include an urban dusk setting — neon-lit streets below, golden-hour reflections on glass towers above
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic, high-contrast golden-hour-to-neon-transition atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm-to-cool dusk direction with neon accent pops — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sharp, high-resolution 8K-quality texture feel — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, primary title, bold modern typeface, prominent position), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (secondary subtitle), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (small watermark, bottom-right corner)
Constraints: must preserve 16:9 aspect ratio strictly; must leave sufficient clear areas for text overlays; all three text elements must be legible and non-overlapping
Avoid:
